title: Long endurance and mobility
description: Sustained deployments of weeks to months, covering hundreds to thousands of kilometres.

title: Adaptive sampling
description: Can be redirected to track fronts, eddies, water masses, and other evolving features.

title: Four-dimensional observations
description: Resolving fine-scale spatial and temporal variability not captured by fixed or freely-drifting platforms.

title: Ability to operate in challenging environments
description: Under ice, shallow continental shelves, fjords, boundary currents, and marginal seas.

title: Resolving variability across scales
description: Observations spanning horizontal scales of kilometres to thousands of kilometres, vertical scales of centimetres to kilometres, and sub-daily to interannual variability.

title: Cross-discipline measurements
description: Physical, biogeochemical, and acoustic observations in a single deployment, with low hydrodynamic noise making gliders particularly well-suited to passive acoustic monitoring.

title: Near-real-time data delivery
description: Data transmitted via satellite at each surfacing, enabling adaptive mission control.
